description: 76 - 16-02-2025 - Email from Peter Mandelson to Morgan McSweeney (former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10)

participants.name: Email from Peter Mandelson to Morgan McSweeney
participants.role: former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister

text:
Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10)

From: Peter Mandelson[Personal

Sent: Sun 16/02/2025 4:22:37 PM (UTC)
To: MMcSweeneyPersonal

Subject: FW: Non communique
Attachment: wie

This is first stab to describe what we want on economic side for 27". Please don’t
forward.
From: Mungo Woodifield
Sent: 16 February 2025 10:45
To: Peter Mandelson
ce: JCS _ ; DL Washi Private Office
Subject: Non communique
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Peter

With thanks to JCS, please find a skeleton communique document envision for post
PM-POTUS meeting on 27th. Substantial contours but light on content.

Grateful for your views. We have a Jonathan Black call at 3pm ET today - it would be
great to be able to share this with him ahead of that if possible.

Best,

Mungo

Mungo Woodifield

Minister Counsellor, Trade & Global Issues

British Embassy Washington

Personal

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

218

From:
Peter Mandelson
Sent:
Mon 17/02/2025 12:04:21 AM (UTC)
To:
Cc:
Mungo Woodifield
Subject:
Peter Thiel
I have asked Peter if he is around on Tuesday to meet up in evening in Miami. He may be but not 
sure of schedule. Asked me to message on Tuesday morning.
